name: data-pulse
description: Testing plugin for metric review, anomaly triage, and lightweight data investigation.

interface.shortDescription: Review metrics and explain where the signal changed
interface.longDescription: Use Data Pulse to inspect summary metrics, flag anomalous movement, and shape the next questions for a deeper analytics pass.
defaultPrompt: Review these metrics and point out the biggest anomalies.
Turn this dashboard summary into a short analysis brief.
Suggest the next data questions for this performance dip.
